title: BUG-0027 Firefly sync 401 Unauthorized (PAT invalid/expired)

CB.primary_verify: After PAT regen + env update + container recreate, GET /api/v1/sync/status shows state:completed; manual Sync now returns completed with entity counts; no 401 in error_message

CC.primary_verify: App surfaces FireflyError::Unauthorized display message on 401 distinguishing PAT invalid from PAT missing from Firefly unreachable; wiremock test asserts Unauthorized variant

CD.primary_verify: ≥3 scheduled syncs succeed post-PAT regen with no silent 401 recurrence

user_guide_mode.reason: Operator remediation is standard Firefly PAT regen; app surfaces self-explanatory display message
